activities_projects.title: Comparative Political Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Critically compare the political responses of Belgium and Sri Lanka to ethnic diversity
steps: Identify the ethnic composition of Belgium and Sri Lanka
Analyse the policies adopted by both governments
Evaluate the political consequences of these policies
Write a comparative report explaining why Belgium avoided conflict while Sri Lanka faced civil war
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops critical comparative analysis of political systems
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of analysis and clarity of reasoning (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Policy Design Activity
activities_projects.objective: Design a power-sharing model for a multi-ethnic country
steps: Imagine a country with three ethnic groups
Design a constitution that ensures equal participation in government
Include provisions for language, education and political representation
Present the model to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies democratic principles to institutional design
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity and feasibility of the model (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Civil War Impact Study
activities_projects.objective: Evaluate the social and economic impact of civil conflict
steps: Research the Sri Lankan civil war
Identify its causes related to power sharing
Analyse its impact on society, economy and politics
Prepare a research summary
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops research and analytical skills in political science
activities_projects.evaluation: Use of evidence and depth of explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Power-sharing Systems Diagram
activities_projects.objective: Analyse different institutional forms of power sharing
steps: List the four forms of power sharing
Create a conceptual diagram showing relationships between them
Add examples from different countries
Explain how each system limits concentration of power
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands institutional checks and balances in democracy

activities_projects.title: Debate on Majority Rule vs Power Sharing
steps: Divide the class into two groups
One group supports majority rule
The other supports power sharing
Conduct a structured debate and summarise key arguments
activities_projects.evaluation: Strength of arguments and participation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Constitution Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Understand constitutional provisions for power sharing in India
steps: Identify constitutional provisions related to federalism
Study provisions for representation of minorities and weaker sections
Explain how these provisions promote power sharing
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Connects constitutional design with democratic principles
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct interpretation of constitutional provisions (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Coalition Politics Case Study
steps: Research a coalition government in India or another country
Identify participating political parties
Explain how power is shared among them
Evaluate advantages and challenges of coalition politics
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands practical functioning of political alliances
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of case study analysis (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Media Analysis Project
activities_projects.objective: Analyse media coverage of power-sharing conflicts
steps: Collect three news articles related to ethnic or political conflict
Identify underlying power-sharing issues
Compare how media reports on these conflicts
Write an analytical report
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops media literacy and political analysis
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of analysis and critical thinking (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Community Representation Data Study
activities_projects.objective: Analyse representation of different groups in governance
steps: Collect data on representation of different communities in parliament or local government
Create a data table showing representation patterns
Interpret the data to assess inclusiveness
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops data interpretation skills in political studies
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of data and interpretation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Democratic Stability Research Paper
activities_projects.objective: Evaluate the role of power sharing in maintaining democratic stability
steps: Study examples of countries with strong power-sharing systems
Compare them with countries experiencing internal conflicts
Analyse the relationship between power sharing and stability
Write a short research paper
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops advanced research and synthesis skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of research and argument (10 marks)
